_comment: Write the battery voltage scale factor computed by the operator/wizard from measured-vs-reported voltage. The descriptor declares `scale`; this body forwards it to the Layer 0 command by reference. Stack converters map to BATT_VOLT_MULT (ArduPilot) / BAT_V_DIV (PX4) and validate read-back.

then.detail: Battery voltage scale write was accepted but read-back did not match.
Battery voltage scale parameter write was rejected by the autopilot.
Battery voltage calibration cancelled by operator.
Battery voltage calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
